title: Air Force Group C (Civilian) Posts Offline Form

detail.title: Air Force Group C (Civilian) Posts Offline Form

sections.title: Set as Preferred Source on Google

content.text: Air Force Group C (Civilian) Recruitment 2026 : Get complete details about Air Force Group C (Civilian) Recruitment 2026, including recruitment updates, total vacancies, important dates, application fees, eligibility criteria, age limit, selection process, salary, syllabus, exam pattern, admit card, answer key, result, and more.

rows.text: Indian Air Force (IAF) Group C (Civilian) Recruitment 2026 Advt. No. : 01/2026 Short Details
Age Limit : 18-25 Years Age Limit as on : 01/06/2026 The Age Relaxation Extra as per Rules.
Written Exam Skill Test (Post Wise) Medical Examination Document Verification

Lower Division Clerk (LDC) : 12th Passed, Typing (English : 35 wpm/ Hindi : 30 wpm). Hindi Typist : 12th Passed, Typing (English : 35 wpm / Hindi : 30 wpm). Driver : 10th Passed, LMV & HMV Driving License, Knowledge of Motor Mechanism, 02 Years Experience.

items: The Age Relaxation Extra as per Rules.
Lower Division Clerk (LDC) : 12th Passed, Typing (English : 35 wpm/ Hindi : 30 wpm).
Hindi Typist : 12th Passed, Typing (English : 35 wpm / Hindi : 30 wpm).
Driver : 10th Passed, LMV & HMV Driving License, Knowledge of Motor Mechanism, 02 Years Experience.

rows.text: Send the duly filled Application form to the Address of the Concerned Air Force Station / Unit for which you want to apply. (Check Notification For Air Force Station Address Details) Write on the envelope containing the application form “APPLICATION FOR THE POST OF …………… AND CATEGORY ………………..“ Duly fill up the application form alongwith Attested Photocopies of Relevant Certificate and a self-addressed envelope with a postage stamp of Rs. 10/-

content.text: Send the duly filled Application form to the Address of the Concerned Air Force Station / Unit for which you want to apply. (Check Notification For Air Force Station Address Details)
Write on the envelope containing the application form “APPLICATION FOR THE POST OF …………… AND CATEGORY ………………..“
Duly fill up the application form alongwith Attested Photocopies of Relevant Certificate and a self-addressed envelope with a postage stamp of Rs. 10/-
